member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1
member.summary: Base class for all aggregate roots in the domain.
member.typeparam: The type of the aggregate's unique identifier.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AggregateRoot class.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.UncommittedEvents
member.summary: Gets the collection of uncommitted domain events for this aggregate.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.Version
member.summary: Gets the current version of this aggregate for event sourcing and concurrency control.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.LoadFromEvents(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent})
member.summary: Loads the aggregate from a collection of domain events. This method reconstructs the aggregate state by applying each event in sequence.
member.param: The collection of domain events to load from.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.ValidateInvariants
member.summary: Validates all invariants for this aggregate.
member.exception: Thrown when any invariant fails validation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.ApplyChange(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Raises a domain event and adds it to the aggregate's event collection. Automatically increments the aggregate version and passes it to the event. Also applies the event to update the aggregate state immediately.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.AddInvariants(System.Action[])
member.summary: Adds invariants to the aggregate.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.ApplyEvent(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Applies a domain event to this aggregate. This method must be implemented by derived classes to handle specific event types.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.AggregateRoot`1.ApplyEvent(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Applies a domain event to this aggregate. This method must be implemented by derived classes to handle specific event types.
member.param: Indicates whether the event is a new event or previously committed event.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1
member.summary: Base class for all domain entities.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity's unique identifier.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Entity class.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for this entity.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1.op_Equality(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity{`0},BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity{`0})
member.summary: Determines whether two entities are equal.
member.returns: True if the entities are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1.op_Inequality(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity{`0},BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity{`0})
member.summary: Determines whether two entities are not equal.
member.returns: True if the entities are not equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the current entity is equal to another entity.
member.param: The entity to compare with the current entity.
member.returns: True if the entities are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1.GetHashCode
member.summary: Gets the hash code for this entity.
member.returns: The hash code.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of this entity.
member.returns: The string representation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Entity`1.IsTransient
member.summary: Determines whether this entity is in a transient state.
member.returns: True if the entity is transient; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.EntityId
member.summary: Prototype: Strongly-typed entity ID with prefix validation via constructor argument and static Create/Generate methods.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.EntityId.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The string value for this entity identifier.
The required prefix for this entity identifier.
member.exception: Thrown if value or prefix is null/empty, or value does not start with prefix.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.EntityId.Value
member.summary: Gets the string value of this entity identifier.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.EntityId`1
member.summary: Generic base class for strongly-typed entity IDs with static Create/Generate methods.
member.typeparam: The concrete ID type.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.EntityId`1.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The string value for this entity identifier.
The required prefix for this entity identifier.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.EntityId`1.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new ID instance from a value.
member.param: The string value for the ID.
member.returns: A new instance of .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.EntityId`1.Generate
member.summary: Generates a new ID instance with a new ULID value and the required prefix.
member.returns: A new instance of .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.EntityId`1.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representing the id.
member.returns: Returns the id value.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration`1
member.summary: Provides a base class for creating strongly-typed enumerations with associated display names and integer values.
member.typeparam: The type of the enumeration that inherits from this base class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration`1.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Provides a base class for creating strongly-typed enumerations with associated display names and integer values.
member.typeparam: The type of the enumeration that inherits from this base class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration`1.FromValue(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts the specified integer value to an instance of type T.
member.remarks: This method is typically used for converting integer values that are defined in an enumeration or similar construct to their corresponding type T instances.
member.param: The integer value to convert. This value must correspond to a valid representation of type T.
member.returns: An instance of type T that represents the specified integer value.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration`1.FromDisplayName(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the specified display name to an instance of type T.
member.param: The display name to convert. This value must not be null or empty.
member.returns: An instance of type T that corresponds to the provided display name. Returns the default value of T if no match is found.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration`1.TryFromValue(System.Int32,`0@)
member.summary: Attempts to convert the specified integer value to an instance of type T.
member.remarks: This method is useful for safely attempting to convert an integer to a specific type without throwing exceptions. It is recommended to check the return value before using the result.
member.param: The integer value to convert to type T.
When this method returns, contains the converted value of type T if the conversion succeeded; otherwise, it is null.
member.returns: true if the conversion succeeded; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration`1.TryFromDisplayName(System.String,`0@)
member.summary: Converts the specified display name to an instance of type T.
member.param: The display name to convert. This value must not be null or empty.
When this method returns, contains the converted value of type T if the conversion succeeded; otherwise, it is null.
member.returns: true if the conversion succeeded; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration`1.GetAll
member.summary: Retrieves all instances of the specified type from the underlying data source.
member.returns: An enumerable collection containing all instances of type T. The collection is empty if no instances are found.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration
member.summary: Base class for rich enumeration patterns.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Enumeration class.
member.param: The integer value of the enumeration.
The display name of the enumeration.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.Value
member.summary: Gets the integer value of the enumeration.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets the display name of the enumeration.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.op_Equality(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Determines whether two enumerations are equal.
member.returns: True if the enumerations are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.op_Inequality(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Determines whether two enumerations are not equal.
member.returns: True if the enumerations are not equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.op_LessThan(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Determines whether the first enumeration is less than the second enumeration.
member.returns: True if the first enumeration is less than the second; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.op_LessThanOrEqual(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Determines whether the first enumeration is less than or equal to the second enumeration.
member.returns: True if the first enumeration is less than or equal to the second; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.op_GreaterThan(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Determines whether the first enumeration is greater than the second enumeration.
member.returns: True if the first enumeration is greater than the second; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Determines whether the first enumeration is greater than or equal to the second enumeration.
member.returns: True if the first enumeration is greater than or equal to the second; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.AbsoluteDifference(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Calculates the absolute difference between two enumeration values.
member.returns: The absolute difference between the values.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the enumeration.
member.returns: The display name of the enumeration.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current enumeration.
member.param: The object to compare with the current enumeration.
member.returns: True if the objects are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.Equals(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified enumeration is equal to the current enumeration.
member.param: The enumeration to compare with the current enumeration.
member.returns: True if the enumerations are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.GetHashCode
member.summary: Gets the hash code for this enumeration.
member.returns: The hash code.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.CompareTo(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration)
member.summary: Compares the current enumeration with another enumeration.
member.returns: A value indicating the relative order of the enumerations.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.FromValue``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets an enumeration instance by its value.
member.typeparam: The type of enumeration.
member.returns: The enumeration instance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.FromDisplayName``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets an enumeration instance by its display name.
member.typeparam: The type of enumeration.
member.param: The display name to search for.
member.returns: The enumeration instance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.GetAll``1
member.summary: Gets all enumeration instances of the specified type.
member.typeparam: The type of enumeration.
member.returns: All enumeration instances.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.TryFromValue``1(System.Int32,``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to get an enumeration instance by its value.
member.typeparam: The type of enumeration.
member.returns: True if the enumeration was found; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Enumeration.TryFromDisplayName``1(System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to get an enumeration instance by its display name.
member.typeparam: The type of enumeration.
member.param: The display name to search for.
member.returns: True if the enumeration was found; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.DomainEvent
member.summary: Base record for all domain events.
member.param: The strongly-typed ID of the aggregate that raised this event.
The version of the aggregate when this event was raised.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.DomainEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Base record for all domain events.
member.param: The strongly-typed ID of the aggregate that raised this event.
The version of the aggregate when this event was raised.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.DomainEvent.AggregateId
member.summary: The strongly-typed ID of the aggregate that raised this event.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.DomainEvent.Version
member.summary: The version of the aggregate when this event was raised.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.DomainEvent.OccurredAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this domain event occurred.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent
member.summary: Marker interface for domain events.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent.OccurredAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this domain event occurred.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent.AggregateId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the aggregate that raised this event.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent.Version
member.summary: Gets the version of the aggregate when this event was raised.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IHandleDomainEvents`1
member.summary: Base interface for domain event handlers.
member.typeparam: The type of domain event to handle.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IHandleDomainEvents`1.HandleAsync(`0)
member.summary: Handles the specified domain event.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IHandleDomainEvents
member.summary: Non-generic interface for event handlers that can handle any domain event.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IHandleDomainEvents.HandleAsync(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Handles the specified domain event.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEvent
member.summary: Marker interface for integration events that cross bounded context boundaries.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEvent.EventId
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for this integration event.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEvent.OccurredAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this integration event occurred.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEvent.SourceBoundedContext
member.summary: Gets the name of the bounded context that published this event.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapper`1
member.summary: Interface for mapping domain events to integration events.
member.typeparam: The type of the domain event to map.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapper`1.Map(`0)
member.summary: Maps a domain event to one or more integration events.
member.param: The domain event to map. This should be a specific domain event type that implements IDomainEvent.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of integration events that represent the domain event.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapperAdapter
member.summary: Adapter interface for mapping domain events to integration events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapperAdapter.CanHandle(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Checks if the mapper can handle the given domain event.
member.returns: True if the mapper can handle the event; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapperAdapter.Map(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Maps a domain event to one or more integration events.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of integration events that represent the domain event.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IntegrationEventMapperAdapter`1
member.summary: Adapter for mapping a specific type of domain event to integration events.
member.typeparam: The type of the domain event to map.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IntegrationEventMapperAdapter`1.#ctor(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapper{`0})
member.summary: Adapter for mapping a specific type of domain event to integration events.
member.typeparam: The type of the domain event to map.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapperService
member.summary: Registry for mapping domain events to integration events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapperService.Map(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Maps a domain event to one or more integration events.
member.param: The domain event instance to map.
member.returns: A collection of integration events mapped from the domain event.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IntegrationEvent
member.summary: Base record for integration events that cross bounded context boundaries. Integration events represent something that happened in one bounded context that other bounded contexts might be interested in, without creating direct dependencies.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IntegrationEvent.EventId
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for this integration event.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IntegrationEvent.OccurredAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this integration event occurred.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IntegrationEvent.SourceBoundedContext
member.summary: Gets the name of the bounded context that published this event.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IntegrationEventMapperService
member.summary: Registry for mapping domain events to integration events.
member.param: The collection of integration event mapper adapters.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IntegrationEventMapperService.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEventMapperAdapter})
member.summary: Registry for mapping domain events to integration events.
member.param: The collection of integration event mapper adapters.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.AggregateNotFoundException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an aggregate root is not found in the repository.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.AggregateNotFoundException.#ctor(System.Type,System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AggregateNotFoundException class.
member.param: The type of the aggregate that was not found.
The identifier of the aggregate that was not found.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.AggregateNotFoundException.#ctor(System.Type,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AggregateNotFoundException class with a custom message.
member.param: The type of the aggregate that was not found.
The identifier of the aggregate that was not found.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.AggregateNotFoundException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AggregateNotFoundException class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.AggregateNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AggregateNotFoundException class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.AggregateNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AggregateNotFoundException class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.AggregateNotFoundException.AggregateType
member.summary: Gets the type of the aggregate that was not found.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.AggregateNotFoundException.AggregateId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the aggregate that was not found.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a business rule is violated during domain operations.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BusinessRuleViolationException class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BusinessRuleViolationException class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BusinessRuleViolationException class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.DomainException
member.summary: Base exception class for domain-specific exceptions.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.DomainException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DomainException class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.DomainException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DomainException class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.DomainException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DomainException class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.InvariantViolationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an aggregate's invariants are violated.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.InvariantViolationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the InvariantViolationException class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.InvariantViolationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the InvariantViolationException class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Exceptions.InvariantViolationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the InvariantViolationException class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.Coordinates
member.summary: Geographic coordinates value object.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.Coordinates.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Coordinates class.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.Coordinates.Latitude
member.summary: Gets the latitude coordinate in degrees.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.Coordinates.Longitude
member.summary: Gets the longitude coordinate in degrees.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.Coordinates.GetEqualityComponents
member.summary: Gets the equality components for this value object.
member.returns: The equality components.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea
member.summary: Geographic area value object representing a bounded region.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GeographicArea class.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea.North
member.summary: Gets the northern boundary in degrees.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea.South
member.summary: Gets the southern boundary in degrees.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea.East
member.summary: Gets the eastern boundary in degrees.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea.West
member.summary: Gets the western boundary in degrees.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea.Center
member.summary: Gets the center coordinates of this geographic area.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea.Contains(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.Coordinates)
member.summary: Determines if the specified coordinates are within this geographic area.
member.returns: True if the coordinates are within this area, false otherwise.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Geography.GeographicArea.GetEqualityComponents
member.summary: Gets the equality components for this value object.
member.returns: The equality components.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.IUncommittedEvents
member.summary: Represents a collection of uncommitted domain events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.IUncommittedEvents.MarkAsCommitted
member.summary: Marks all events as committed and clears the collection.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId
member.summary: Value object representing Unique identifier for a participant.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ParticipantId class.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId.Anonymous
member.summary: Represents an anonymous participant with a predefined identifier.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId.IsAnonymous
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current instance represents an anonymous user.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Services.ITimeProvider
member.summary: Abstraction for providing the current time. This allows for controllable time in tests and development scenarios.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Services.ITimeProvider.UtcNow
member.summary: Gets the current date and time as a DateTimeOffset in UTC.
member.returns: The current UTC DateTimeOffset.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Services.TimeProviderContext
member.summary: Global context for accessing the current time provider. This allows domain events to get the current time without direct dependency injection.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Services.TimeProviderContext.Current
member.summary: Gets the current time provider instance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Services.TimeProviderContext.SetCurrent(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Services.ITimeProvider)
member.summary: Sets the current time provider. This should typically only be called during application startup, testing, or seeding scenarios.
member.param: The time provider to set as current.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Services.TimeProviderContext.Reset
member.summary: Resets the time provider to the default system time provider.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.SocietyId
member.summary: Value object representing Unique identifier for a society.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.SocietyId.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.UncommittedEvents
member.summary: Maintains a collection of domain events that have been raised but not yet committed.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.UncommittedEvents.Append(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Appends a domain event to the uncommitted collection.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.UncommittedEvents.MarkAsCommitted
member.summary: Marks all currently uncommitted events as committed by clearing the collection.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.UncommittedEvents.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the uncommitted domain events.
member.returns: An enumerator over the uncommitted domain events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.UncommittedEvents.System#Collections#IEnumerable#GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns a non-generic enumerator that iterates through the uncommitted domain events.
member.returns: An enumerator over the uncommitted domain events.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject
member.summary: Base class for all value objects in the domain.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject.op_Inequality(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject)
member.summary: Determines whether two value objects are not equal.
member.param: The first value object to compare.
The second value object to compare.
member.returns: True if the value objects are not equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject.op_Equality(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject)
member.summary: Determines whether two value objects are equal.
member.param: The first value object to compare.
The second value object to compare.
member.returns: True if the value objects are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current value object.
member.param: The object to compare with the current value object.
member.returns: True if the objects are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject.GetHashCode
member.summary: Gets the hash code for this value object.
member.returns: The hash code.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of this value object.
member.returns: The string representation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ValueObject.GetEqualityComponents
member.summary: Gets the components that make up the value of this object for equality comparison.
member.returns: An enumerable of objects that represent the value components.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Extensions.MartenServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring Marten services in the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Extensions.MartenServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMartenServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.Action{Marten.StoreOptions},System.Action{Marten.MartenServiceCollectionExtensions.MartenConfigurationExpression})
member.summary: Adds Marten services to the service collection with the specified connection string. This method ensures Marten services are only registered once per application.
member.param: Optional configuration action for Marten options.
member.returns: The service collection for chaining.
member.param: Optional configuration action for the Marten builder (e.g., registering IInitialData seeders).

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Extensions.MartenServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMartenUnitOfWork(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the Marten unit of work to the service collection.
member.returns: The service collection for chaining.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Services.ControllableTimeProvider
member.summary: Implementation of ITimeProvider that allows manual control of time progression for seeding and testing.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Services.ControllableTimeProvider.#ctor(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ControllableTimeProvider class.
member.param: The initial time to start from.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Services.ControllableTimeProvider.Advance(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Advances the current time by the specified duration.
member.param: The duration to advance the time by.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Services.ControllableTimeProvider.AdvanceDays(System.Int32)
member.summary: Advances the current time by the specified number of days.
member.param: The number of days to advance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Services.ControllableTimeProvider.AdvanceHours(System.Int32)
member.summary: Advances the current time by the specified number of hours.
member.param: The number of hours to advance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Services.ControllableTimeProvider.SetTime(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Sets the current time to a specific value.
member.param: The time to set as current.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Services.SystemTimeProvider
member.summary: Default implementation of ITimeProvider that returns the current system time.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IProjection`1
member.summary: Base interface for Marten projections that handle domain events.
member.typeparam: The type of the read model.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IProjection`1.ProjectionName
member.summary: Gets the name of the projection.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IProjection`1.Handle(`0,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Handles a domain event and updates the read model accordingly.
member.returns: The updated read model.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IProjection`1.Create
member.summary: Creates a new read model instance.
member.returns: A new read model instance.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IRepository`2
member.summary: Base repository interface for event-sourced aggregates.
member.typeparam: The type of the aggregate root.
The type of the aggregate's unique identifier.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IRepository`2.ExistsByIdAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously determines whether an entity with the specified identifier exists.
member.param: The unique identifier of the entity to check for existence.
A cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains if an entity with the specified identifier exists; otherwise, .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IRepository`2.GetByIdAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an aggregate by its identifier.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The aggregate if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IRepository`2.Stage(`0)
member.summary: Stages an aggregate's uncommitted events to the session without committing changes. The unit of work should be used to commit the staged changes.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IRepository`2.GetByIdOrThrowAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an aggregate by its identifier, throwing an exception if not found.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The aggregate.
member.exception: Thrown when the aggregate is not found.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IUnitOfWork
member.summary: Unit of work interface for managing transactions and ensuring consistency across multiple repository operations.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.IUnitOfWork.CommitAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits the current transaction.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2
member.summary: Base Marten repository implementation for event-sourced aggregates.
member.typeparam: The type of the aggregate root.
The type of the aggregate's unique identifier.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2.#ctor(Marten.IDocumentSession,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MartenRepository class.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2.Session
member.summary: Gets the Marten document session used for database operations.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2.ExistsByIdAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously determines whether a stream with the specified identifier exists.
member.param: The unique identifier of the stream to check for existence. This parameter cannot be null.
A cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains if the stream exists; otherwise, .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2.GetByIdAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an aggregate by its identifier.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The aggregate if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2.Stage(`0)
member.summary: Stages an aggregate's uncommitted events to the session without committing changes. The unit of work should be used to commit the staged changes. Integration events are published asynchronously via Wolverine event subscriptions after the domain events are committed.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2.GetByIdOrThrowAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an aggregate by its identifier, throwing an exception if not found.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The aggregate.
member.exception: Thrown when the aggregate is not found.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2.GetStreamId(`1)
member.summary: Gets the stream identifier for the given aggregate identifier.
member.returns: The stream identifier.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenRepository`2.CreateAggregateInstance
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the aggregate. This method must be implemented by derived classes to provide the appropriate constructor.
member.returns: A new instance of the aggregate.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenUnitOfWork
member.summary: Marten unit of work implementation that manages transactions using Marten's document session.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenUnitOfWork.#ctor(Marten.IDocumentSession,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenUnitOfWork})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MartenUnitOfWork class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenUnitOfWork.CommitAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits the current transaction.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenUnitOfWork.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the unit of work and underlying session.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Persistence.MartenUnitOfWork.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the unit of work and underlying session.
member.param: True if disposing; false if finalizing.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.QueryableSpecificationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for applying specifications to queryable sources.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.QueryableSpecificationExtensions.Matching``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification{``0})
member.summary: Filters a queryable source to elements that satisfy the provided specification.
member.typeparam: The element type.
member.returns: A filtered queryable source.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification`1
member.summary: Base class for specifications that encapsulate domain knowledge and business rules.
member.typeparam: The type of entity this specification applies to.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification`1.All
member.summary: Gets a specification that matches all entities.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification`1.IsSatisfiedBy(`0)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified entity satisfies this specification.
member.returns: True if the entity satisfies this specification; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification`1.And(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new specification that combines this specification with another using AND logic.
member.returns: A new specification representing the AND combination.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification`1.Or(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new specification that combines this specification with another using OR logic.
member.returns: A new specification representing the OR combination.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification`1.Not
member.summary: Creates a new specification that negates this specification.
member.returns: A new specification representing the negation of this specification.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification`1.ToExpression
member.summary: Converts this specification to an expression that can be used for database queries.
member.returns: An expression representing this specification.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.IdentitySpecification`1
member.summary: Identity specification that matches all entities.
member.typeparam: The type of entity this specification applies to.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.IdentitySpecification`1.ToExpression
member.summary: Returns an expression that always evaluates to true.
member.returns: An expression that matches all entities.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.AndSpecification`1
member.summary: Specification that combines two specifications using AND logic.
member.typeparam: The type of entity this specification applies to.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.AndSpecification`1.#ctor(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification{`0},BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AndSpecification class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.AndSpecification`1.ToExpression
member.summary: Returns an expression that combines the left and right specifications using AND logic.
member.returns: An expression representing the AND combination.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.OrSpecification`1
member.summary: Specification that combines two specifications using OR logic.
member.typeparam: The type of entity this specification applies to.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.OrSpecification`1.#ctor(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification{`0},BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OrSpecification class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.OrSpecification`1.ToExpression
member.summary: Returns an expression that combines the left and right specifications using OR logic.
member.returns: An expression representing the OR combination.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.NotSpecification`1
member.summary: Specification that negates another specification.
member.typeparam: The type of entity this specification applies to.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.NotSpecification`1.#ctor(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.Specification{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the NotSpecification class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.NotSpecification`1.ToExpression
member.summary: Returns an expression that negates the underlying specification.
member.returns: An expression representing the negation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.ParameterReplacer
member.summary: Expression visitor that replaces parameter expressions.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.ParameterReplacer.#ctor(System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression,System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ParameterReplacer class.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Specifications.ParameterReplacer.VisitParameter(System.Linq.Expressions.ParameterExpression)
member.summary: Visits a parameter expression and replaces it if it matches the old parameter.
member.returns: The new parameter expression if it matches; otherwise, the original.
